## Title: Fix assignment vs equality bug in E1AP bearer context modification parsing

### Summary
Fixed a critical bug in the E1AP bearer context modification request parser where an assignment operator (`=`) was incorrectly used instead of an equality operator (`==`) within a DevAssert statement. This bug, located in `extract_BEARER_CONTEXT_MODIFICATION_REQUEST()`, caused the assertion to always evaluate as true, effectively disabling validation of the `uP_TNL_Information.present` field.
